1 km Run.note: World record ~2:11 (men). Relative to trained runners.

2 km Run.note: World record ~4:44. Relative to trained runners.

5 km Run.note: Based on 736,928 race results — avg finish 34:29. Top 30% break 30:00, top 10% break 27:00, top 1% sub-18:40.

Half Marathon (21.1 km) Run.note: Median men 1:59, women 2:24. Top 10% men sub-1:47, top 1% men sub-1:18.

Marathon (42.2 km) Run.note: Median ~4:20–4:30. Top 25% under 3:55. Based on 107M+ race results.

Chess.note: Chess.com median ~500, Lichess median ~1400 (different scales). FIDE: 2200+ = FIDE Master, 2500+ = GM. Use either platform — Lichess runs ~200–300pts higher.

ranks.label: First steps — Chess.com under 800 / Lichess under 1000

Typing.note: Average office typist 40 WPM. Touch-typist 60–80. Competitive 120+. TypeRacer / Monkeytype data.

Valorant.note: Iron ~35%, Bronze ~25%, Silver ~20%, Gold ~12%, Platinum ~5%, Diamond ~2%, Ascendant ~0.7%, Radiant ~0.03%. Riot Games data.

League of Legends.note: ~150M players. Iron–Bronze ~40%, Silver ~25%, Gold ~20%, Platinum ~10%, Diamond ~2%, Master+ ~0.5%. Riot Games.

CS2.note: CS2 Premier Rating. FACEIT ELO 500–4000. Valve / ESIC data.

Clash Royale – Trophy Road.note: 14,000 trophies = max Trophy Road. Path of Legends eligible at 13,000.

Clash Royale – Path of Legends.note: Seasonal — rank stored as all-time max so season resets don't drop user rank. 10 tiers: Challenger I-III, Master I-III, Champion, Grand Champion, Royal Champion, Ultimate Champion.

Web Development.note: EXP from community engagement + 10 EXP per verified platform user

Mobile Development.note: EXP from community engagement + 10 EXP per verified platform user

Systems & Backend.note: EXP from community engagement + 10 EXP per verified platform user

ML & AI Engineering.note: EXP from community engagement + 10 EXP per verified platform user

Game Development.note: EXP from community engagement + 10 EXP per verified platform user

300m Sprint.note: World record 30.81s (Wayde van Niekerk, 2015). Sub-elite ~35s, average ~45s.

100m Sprint.note: World record 9.58s (Usain Bolt, 2009). Average untrained adult ~15-20s.

200m Sprint.note: World record 19.19s (Usain Bolt, 2009). Average untrained adult ~35-45s.

400m Sprint.note: World record 43.03s (Wayde van Niekerk, 2016). Average untrained adult ~80-100s.
